raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir tawu paſchu Mahti
Maëku nozehle wiſch/ ka ta par
Kehnininni ne buhtu/ tapehz ka
ta weenu negantu Elka-Deewu
bij darrijuți tahdá kuplá Meschâ/
un Affus tspohſtija arridsan
wiẍas negantu Elka-Deewu/
un wiſch fadedsinaja to pee tahs
Rihdrana Uppes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tee Augſtumi ne tap-
pe nopohſtiti / tomehr Affus
Girds bija pilniga ar to KUN-
Ell wiẍá wiẍa Laiká.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſch neſte ta KUN-
GA Namina tahs Leetas / ko
wiẍa Tehws bij fwheṭijs / un
ko wiſch pats bij fwheṭijs/Su-
drabu un Seltu un Trankue.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ſtarp Afu un Baë-
suto Israëta Kehninu bijaRarſch/
wiẍá wiẍu Laiká.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Baësus tas Israëta
: Kehninisch zildinajahs prett Juh-
du / un uſtaisfija Rahmu / ka
wiſch ne weenam dohtu iſeet un
ee-eet/ pee Afus ta Juhda Keh-
nina.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Affus nehme wiſu
Sudrabu un Seltu/ kas wehl
atlïke eekch ta KUNGA Nam-
ma Mantahm/ un eekch ta Keh-
nina Namna Mantahm / un
dewe tohs fatweem Kalpeem Roh-
ká/ un tas Kehninisch Affus tuh-
tija tohs us Ben-Adadu / Ta-
brimona Dehlu / ta Dehla Eſi-
ana/to Kehninu no Sihrijas/kas
Damaskufá dsihwoja/fazzidams:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Weena Derriba irr ſtarp
man un ſtarp tew/ ſtarp mannu
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tehwu un ſtarp tawu Tehwu/
Reds/ es fuhtu tew tahdn Dah-
wanu Sudrabu un Seltu / eij/
un iſnihzint tawu Derribu ar
Baësu to Israëta Kehninu / ka
tas no manniin atſiahjahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Ben-Adads klaufija
tam Kehninam Affum/ un fuḥ-
tija ſawus Karra-Spehka Wirt-
neekus us Israëta Pilsfahteem /
un ſawe Jionn un Dannu / un
Abel Bet-Maëku / un wiſu Ki-
nerotu pee wiẍas Semmes
Nawtata.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu Baësus to dsirde-
ja/ tad painette wiſch Rah-
mas Taifischamu / un paliffe
celfch Tirzas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad liſke tas Kehninisch
Affus zaur wiẍu Juhdu iſfaukt/
(neweens tappe iſxeemts)/ ka tee
tohs Akmixus no Rahmas un
wiẍas Kobkus atxeentu/ ko Ba-
esus tur bij uſtaisfis / un tas
Kehninisch Affus uſtaisfija ar teem
Gebu-Benjaminun/ un Mizpu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kaswehl no Affus Lee-
tahm atleeſ/ un wiſs wiẍa
Spehks/ un wiſs / ko wiſch irr
darrijs/un wiſi wiẍa Pilsfah-
ti/ ko wiſch irr uſdarrijs/ redſ/
tee irr rakſtiti to Kehninu no Juh-
da Laikn-Grahinatá / bes ween/
ka wiſch fatwá Wezzuná pee ta-
wahm Rahjahn neweffels tappe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Affus aiſmigge ar
faweem Tehweem/ un tappe pee
faweem Tehweem ſawa Tehwa
Pilsfahtá aprakts. Un Yofa-
wats
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
